pqr_criteria.criteria: Construction of 3 Nos. RCC Digestor tanks (32m diameter x 8.25m height) using the slip form technique.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 1- TENTATIVE LIST OF STRUCTURES

pqr_criteria.criteria: Construction of 1 No. RCC LDT tank (11m diameter x 5m height) using the slip form technique.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 1- TENTATIVE LIST OF STRUCTURES

pqr_criteria.criteria: Reinforcement steel must be TMT Fe 500D grade.
references: Annexure-1_IOCL Projects - ITP Civil - Rev 0 - 29th March 24-signed.pdf, Section: Definitions and Abbreviations

pqr_criteria.criteria: The make of the reinforcement steel requires prior approval from the client.
references: IOCL JIND BOQ.xlsx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Concrete must be machine batched, machine mixed, and design mix. Admixtures must conform to IS 9103.
references: IOCL JIND BOQ.xlsx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Concrete mix design for all grades (M15, M20, M25, M30) must be conducted by the contractor at a NABL accredited lab.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:
Annexure-1_IOCL Projects - ITP Civil - Rev 0 - 29th March 24-signed.pdf, Section: Definitions and Abbreviations

pqr_criteria.criteria: M20 grade concrete for works up to plinth level must have a minimum cement content of 270 kg/cum.
references: IOCL JIND BOQ.xlsx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Internal road (800m x 6m) must be constructed with Steel Fiber Reinforced Concrete (SFRC) M20 grade, 150mm thick.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 1- TENTATIVE LIST OF STRUCTURES

pqr_criteria.criteria: Internal drains must be constructed using RCC/Brickwork with non-pressure NP3 class RCC pipes.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 1- TENTATIVE LIST OF STRUCTURES
IOCL JIND BOQ.xlsx, Section: General

pqr_criteria.criteria: Contractor must have and use at least 02 Nos. of Boom Placers for casting the Digester and RCC Tanks.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:

pqr_criteria.criteria: All civil works must be executed in strict compliance with relevant IS standards (including IS:456, IS:516, IS:10262) and CPWD specifications.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:

pqr_criteria.criteria: Contractor is responsible for conducting material tests like Slump cone test, compressive test, and sieve analysis at their own cost.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:

pqr_criteria.criteria: For each concrete mix, a minimum of 6 cubes must be tested for compression strength (3 at 7 days, 3 at 28 days).
references: Annexure-1_IOCL Projects - ITP Civil - Rev 0 - 29th March 24-signed.pdf, Section: Definitions and Abbreviations

pqr_criteria.criteria: Bidder must have adequate experience and be well-established in executing similar civil construction works of comparable magnitude.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:

pqr_criteria.criteria: The CVs of the proposed Project Manager, Civil Site Engineer, and QC Inspector must be submitted for review and approval by GPSR before deployment.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 3- LIST OF PLANT & MACHINERY

pqr_criteria.criteria: Contractor must cover all workers and staff under the ESI & PF scheme and comply with all local statutory laws.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 3- LIST OF PLANT & MACHINERY

pqr_criteria.criteria: Contractor must obtain a minimum amount of third-party liability insurance and workmen compensation insurance.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Table 3- LIST OF PLANT & MACHINERY

pqr_criteria.criteria: Contractor must adhere to the Health, Safety & Environment (HSE) policy as issued by GPS Renewables (Refer to Annexure-2).
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: SECTION-I- GENERAL INSTRUCTION/ QUALITY/ MATERIAL/ HSE

pqr_criteria.criteria: The project location is Jind.
references: IGRPL_PS_JIN_01-00-RFP-Civil construction.pdf, Section: Introduction:

pqr_criteria.criteria: TMT Bar and Fiber Steel are excluded from the contractor's scope of supply and will be provided by the client as free-issue material.
references: Annexure_3-GPS-CBG-15TPD-CIVIL-DOR.pdf, Section: General
